description: Three PostToolUse hooks for widget-platform's comparator loop. (1) inspect_screen: uploads the raw device UI tree directly to widget-platform's backend and substitutes a small capture_id in place of the full tree, so the calling model never has to retype a large device tree as a tool-call argument. (2) launch_widget_on_device: generates a real, scannable QR code for the widget's deeplink and saves it to a local file, so the end-of-loop report has a concrete artifact to reference instead of depending on the model remembering to make one. (3) advance_comparator_loop: reinforces the tool's own round_report field with a loud, separate instruction, so the mandatory per-round score/breakdown reporting doesn't silently stay buried in a JSON blob the model reads via jq but never surfaces in chat. Verified live (2026-07-13): updatedToolOutput fully replaces an MCP tool's result before the model sees it.
